title: Eva 00s jaw mouth
wikitext:
[]: Eva-00's jaw/mouth?             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Fri Nov 09, 2007 1:53 am Does she even have one? And even if she doesn't why does every other Eva was made with a mouth, when the Prototype never had one? That's pretty selfish of whoever created it. Hmph!

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Nov 09, 2007 2:34 am The monitor in episode 5 says she does, Reichu isn't sure if she believes it though...

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Fri Nov 09, 2007 4:37 am [URL=http://img409.imageshack.us/my.php?image=p072i202bo9.jpg] [/URL] One of my favorites from Die sterne. You can clearly see a mouth here, but whether or not she was supposed to have one in the anime I don't know.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Fri Nov 09, 2007 6:16 am I think there was, because that protruding chin is present. I think that the construction of it did not take into account of the mouth opening.

[]:             Quote Post by Semisubtle » Fri Nov 09, 2007 4:21 pm Yes, the chin is visible, and I think that's enough to say that Unit 00 does have a mouth, even though it's never actually opened it.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Fri Nov 09, 2007 4:36 pm This is an assumption, but maybe they welded the mouth together on purpose using the head restraints unit.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Nov 09, 2007 4:54 pm Maybe the armor just wasn't designed to have an opening mouth. EVA-02 was like that after all.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Fri Nov 09, 2007 4:58 pm True, true.

[]:             Quote Post by Semisubtle » Fri Nov 09, 2007 6:34 pm If that's the case, then it's odd that Unit 01 WAS designed to have an opening mouth, even though it was welded shut.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Nov 09, 2007 6:37 pm Plot contrivance, can't eat an S^2 organ without an opening mouth...

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Nov 09, 2007 8:32 pm Vlad (Russian Member): We knew that Evangelions could not generate S2 engines, but we never dreamt it would take one into itself like this! It seems like Gendo had given Yui a lot of leeway in getting an S2 engine. And not to mention that both a blood-smeared Gendo and Fuyutsuki are smiling when the Eva gets its engine. "Was this part of your scenario, Ikari?" "In a manner of speaking, yes." (I can't remember the exact lines)

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Nov 10, 2007 2:39 am Kaji: Unit 01's been awakened and set free. Seele won't stay quiet for this. Was this also part of your script, Commander Ikari? FUYUTSUKI: It's begun, hasn't it? IKARI: Yes, it all begins here.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Sat Nov 10, 2007 6:12 pm So Gendo anticipated that Eva-1 would open its mouth to consume the S2 Engine?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sat Nov 10, 2007 9:21 pm He certainly gave Yui the leeway to do so.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sun Nov 11, 2007 12:23 am Perhaps WETA knows something we don't. Anyway, something I feel I should point out, EVA-03 had a mouth, and if it did, the same goes for EVA-04. The EVA-05 MP series also had mouths (though little else). Based on this, though they're later models, I think it's safe to assume EVA-02 and EVA-00 had mouths as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Nov 11, 2007 2:06 am We know EVA-02 had a mouth, we see it in EoE. The armor on it doesn't. It's important to distingush between the Evas mouth and the armors mouth. In offical artwork EVA-04 is depicted as having the same armor design as EVA-03. If EVA-00 doesn't have a mouth it'd be the freak of the bunch.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Nov 11, 2007 2:43 am Eva-00 also lacks Nostrils on the armor, while all the Evas have nostrils (Eva-01's nostrils are extremely small and only seen on a few detailed shots). The image shows that Zero does have nostrils as well. And the Eye on Eva-00 is wierd too. It never glows once and appears to be more of a giant camera or something of that sort instead of an acutal eye. As a matter of fact...what is Eva-00's actual face like?

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sun Nov 11, 2007 2:43 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: If EVA-00 doesn't have a mouth it'd be the freak of the bunch.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Nov 11, 2007 2:46 am Going berserk at odd moments and looking more like a robot than anything else...not to mention capable of chucking that Spear at Arael. Sure, quirks.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Nov 11, 2007 4:31 am Alaska Slim wrote: Then again, it is the 'prototype', and they always tend to have some kind of quirks... 8)
